key_dungeons.name: Lost Tomb
key_dungeons.description: Thick vines choke the mouth of Lost Tomb. Beyond them, torchlight flickers in the gloom.
key_dungeons.quest_objective: Purge Lost Tomb of evil and secure the Jade Key
key_dungeons.quest_hint: Dark forces have claimed this place as their own.

game_log: Harrard Harry: A crazy lady took my granpa's heirloom sword and hid it somewhere in an abandoned building. Can you help me get it back? Also, there may be goblins involved.  [ENTER]
Harrard Harry: Wonderful! I'm counting on you. Good luck!
Quest 'Find the Heirloom': Deal with the Goblins - Complete!
Harrard Harry: Thank you, hero! Here is your reward: +100 XP, +100 Gold  [ENTER]
You descend into Dragon's Lair - Floor 1... No torch equipped!
You descend into Dragon's Lair - Floor 1... No torch equipped!
Aeron the Shopkeeper: Rats! Rats have infested my shop's basement. Not just any rats, but Giant Rats. Can you kill them? All of them! I will reward you. I promise.
Aeron the Shopkeeper: Wonderful! I'm counting on you. Good luck out there!
Quest 'Rats': Kill the Basement Rats - Complete!
Quest 'Rats': Kill the Grumpy Goblin - Complete!
All steps done! Return to the quest giver for your reward.
Aeron the Shopkeeper: Thank you, hero! Here is your reward: +100 XP, +100 Gold
